name: content-article
description: SEO blog posts, thought leadership, editorial content, guides, tutorials
usage_hint: Use for blog posts, SEO articles, thought leadership, guides, and editorial content. The goal is organic discovery and audience building, not direct conversion or support.

criteria.name: originality
criteria.description: Generic content ranks poorly and earns no audience loyalty

criteria.name: readability
criteria.description: Long-form content must sustain engagement to reduce bounce rate

criteria.name: seo-effectiveness
criteria.description: Organic search is the primary distribution channel for content

criteria.name: information-architecture
criteria.description: Well-structured articles rank better and are shared more

criteria.name: tone-alignment
criteria.description: Consistent editorial voice builds audience trust over time

criteria.name: customer-empathy
criteria.description: Content that answers real questions earns search intent match

criteria.name: value-proposition-clarity
criteria.description: Even editorial content should demonstrate brand expertise

criteria.name: brand-consistency
criteria.description: Each article contributes to the brand's content identity
